title: Colliers India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Colliers India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Colliers India in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Colliers India:
Colliers India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colliers India!
